Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Anagi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Anagi is someone Yan Shoumei mentions.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Shoumei can have Anagi's head on a plate as a reward.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi is an Overlord who was an Archlord a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi is positioning his students for invasion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi has undergone three soulfire baptisms to perfect his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi's voice is described as slippery and warm like a squirming eel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi is a provincial ruler who exercises authority over those beneath him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi uses blue madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi's weapon has a blue shine and its binding carries the fury of an ocean storm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi possesses Ruler techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi has soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi is wounded and has depleted madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi uses a chain-and-sickle weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi burst into black flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi was a powerful Archlord.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
